name: Brown Sugar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter together until well blended.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Gradually add the milk, whisking continuously to maintain a smooth batter.
4. Sift flour into a large bowl along with baking powder and salt.
5. Mix in the dry ingredients slowly until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into an oiled pan, sprinkling it evenly with brown sugar.
7. Sprinkle cinnamon over the top of the batter.
8. Dot the batter with small pieces of butter.
9. Bake in a hot oven (435°F) for 25 minutes.
10. Serve warm, portioned into six servings.
